name: Decomposition
summary: Orchestrator splits task into subtasks; specialists run in parallel.
about: An orchestrator analyzes the prompt and breaks it into 3–5 focused subtasks. Specialist agents run in parallel, each blind to the others. A synthesizer merges all outputs into a coherent final response.
example_prompts: Build a personal finance tracker web app
Set up a machine learning pipeline for fraud detection
Launch a technical blog from scratch

orchestrator.description: Analyzes the task and breaks it into focused, non-overlapping subtasks
orchestrator.system: You are an orchestrator. Analyze the user's task and break it into 3-5 focused subtasks for specialist agents. Ensure subtasks are complementary and cover different aspects. Return a JSON array of objects with 'role' (short specialist title) and 'task' (specific instructions for that specialist). Respond ONLY with valid JSON. No markdown, no explanation, no preamble.

output.description: Array of subtasks to be assigned to specialists

specialist.system: You are a specialist: {{item.role}}. Complete your assigned subtask thoroughly and concisely. Stay strictly within your assigned scope.

synthesizer.description: Merges all specialist outputs into one coherent response
synthesizer.system: You are a synthesizer. Merge the specialists' outputs into a single coherent, well-structured response. Resolve contradictions, eliminate redundancy, and ensure the result directly answers the original task.
